nasb.text: The one who guards his mouth preserves his life; The one who opens wide his lips comes to ruin.

esv.text: Whoever guards his mouth preserves his life; he who opens wide his lips comes to ruin.

cnv.text: 謹慎口舌的，可保性命； 口沒遮攔的，自取滅亡。

ccb.text: 说话谨慎，可保性命； 口无遮拦，自取灭亡。

csbs.text: 谨守自己口的，保守自己的性命； 口无遮拦的，导致自己的败亡。
